arts.ttl: Jonas Wind on Wolfsburg's European push, the club's Danish contingent, Super Bowl LIX and more
arts.sum: I expect a tough game, but last time we played them here at home we had a good fight and lost by one goal . bundesliga.com: Like you say: on the other hand, a good season with eight goals and three assists so far?

arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen will look to keep their Bundesliga title hopes alive when they visit Volkswagen Arena on Saturday to face Wolfsburg.

arts.sum: In an interview published in the Thursday print edition of Kicker, German goalkeeper Marius Müller spoke on what it felt like to make his German top flight debut at the age of 31.

arts.ttl: Leverkusen, rivals Cologne highlight magic of the DFB-Pokal
arts.sum: Part of the appeal is the way it fits seamlessly into the German football calendar, starting with the tradition of the first round in August at the homes of exotically named teams like Teutonia Ottensen and SV Rödinghausen who the rest of the time struggle to make headlines. Whereas cup competitions in most other countries have for years felt devalued, the DFB-Pokal continues to set the standard for what fans deserve.
